title: allium lepsicum
intro: Allium lepsicum, also known as Korean chili pepper or Korean hot pepper, is a species of wild garlic that belongs to the Allium genus. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Allium lepsicum include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used as a spice in various Korean and Asian dishes.
